title: Mange Logs
description: Logging a wide range of user actions.
body:
## Mange Logs
Mange Logs is a moderation tool that logs dozens of different user actions on your server. It provides an easy-to-read audit trail.

## Configuration
The mod's configuration file is located at ``./config/MangeLogs/config.yml``.
You can enable or disable logging for specific events in the logging section of the configuration file. By default, all events are enabled.

Logs located at ``./MangeLogs/``.

Currently logged:
```
AttackBlock
AttackEntity
BlockBreak
EggsThrown
UseItem
UseBlock
UseEntity
ItemPickup
ItemDropped
UIClick
ChatMessage
CommandExecution
ItemPlacedInFrame
ItemFrameItemRemoved
ItemBreak
ItemPickup
ItemDespawn
ItemDestroyed
MinecartDestroyed
MobPickupItem
```
